calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Trust
Off Calendar May-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Russell Rowen for (petitioners) Ho Bet Lee, Lai Fong Lee and Leo Ming Lee.

The Court stated that it has read everything and asked if there has been any opposition. Mr. Rowen stated that there has not and that everyone has consented. The Court granted the petition to modify trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
